creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-07-29 14:12:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/py-netifaces     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Getting network addresses from Python
  
  It.s been irritating me for ages that it isn.t possible to
  straightforwardly get the network address(es) of the machine
  you.re running on from a Python program.
  
  WWW:    http://alastairs-place.net/netifaces/
  
  PR:             ports/137236
  Submitted by:   Stanislav Svirid <count at 211.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2128    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/net/py-netifaces/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/py-netifaces/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/net/py-netifaces/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/net/py-netifaces/pkg-plist (new)
